hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$o = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'SessionStart'; additionalContext = 'Git workflow skills available. Use /gw-bootstrap to discover all 10 skills as slash commands (type / to browse), or /gw for natural-language routing. All skills: branch, commit, sync, hotfix, release, diagnose, and more.' } }; $o | ConvertTo-Json -Compress"
